sourceTitle: Assessment Policies and Procedures | HKUST - Academic Registry
evidenceSnippetOriginal: the course syllabus should be devised to present course ILOs, assessment components, grading rubrics, and relevant policies like the use of Generative AI tools and the rules of academic integrity clearly and make it accessible to students at the start of the course via Canvas or other appropriate platform.
evidenceLocator: Assessment of students should be transparent, point 5
